params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Taste. Focus tightly on: kitchen cabinets, range hood, kitchen island or counter, clean counter vignette (wood board, ceramic bowl), matte cabinetry, visible connection to dining bay daylight, soft under-cabinet practicals if visible, matte wood or painted lower cabinets, clean countertop with 1–2 curated objects, visible connection to dining light/panel, soft warm practical under-cabinet lighting (if visible). Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A calm, family-friendly Japandi scheme that balances minimal Japanese restraint with Scandinavian warmth. Neutral, warm-beige tones and layered natural materials create a meditative, lived-in look. Prioritize breathable negative space, low furniture silhouettes, and tactile accents while adding two family-specific elements: a compact crib in the bedroom and a compact standing desk integrated into the living corner. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
